title: Teledyne FLIR launches Lepton XDS thermal/visual camera module
description:
Teledyne FLIR OEM has designed its Lepton XDS compact thermal and visible camera for space- and power-constrained products.

The post Teledyne FLIR launches Lepton XDS thermal/visual camera module appeared first on The Robot Report.
